ddls:
CREATE TABLE "astronomical_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the astronomical object */,
  "nametype" TEXT /* Type of name (e.g., Valid, Temporary) */,
  "recclass" TEXT /* Classification of the object (e.g., H4, L6) */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the object in grams */,
  "fall" TEXT /* Method of discovery (e.g., Found, Observed) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the object was discovered */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the discovery location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the discovery location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographical location in a formatted string */,
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the object_types table */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the classification table */,
  "discovery_method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the discovery_methods table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_astronomical_objects_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classification ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_astronomical_objects_discovery_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("discovery_method_id") REFERENCES discovery_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_astronomical_objects_object_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Meteorite, Comet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Extended description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification (e.g., H4, L6) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Extended description of the classification */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the object_types table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discovery_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discovery method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the discovery method (e.g., Found, Observed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discovery method */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Extended description of the discovery method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the astronomical_objects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES astronomical_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trajectory_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the astronomical_objects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the predicted trajectory */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the predicted trajectory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectory_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectory_predictions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES astronomical_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
